#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# TWS / IBM WORKLOAD SCHEDULER - LINEAGE PARSER STRESS TEST
# Format: composer (text) definition language
#
# Deliberately exercises the scheduler-parsing edges a naive parser misses:
#   - multiple job streams across multiple workstations
#   - internal FOLLOWS (same stream) vs external/qualified FOLLOWS
#       (workstation#stream.job) -- the name-collision / qualification trap
#   - conditional dependencies: IF SUCC / IF ABEND / IF RC expressions
#   - join dependencies (a job following several predecessors)
#   - RESOURCE (semaphore) and PROMPT (manual gate) dependencies
#   - OPENS file dependencies (dataset touchpoints)
#   - RECOVERY options (stop / continue / rerun + recovery job)
#   - run cycles / calendars / time restrictions (AT, UNTIL, DEADLINE)
#   - EVERY (rerun cadence), PRIORITY, LIMIT
#   - duplicate job names ACROSS streams (must NOT be merged)
#   - cross-stream FOLLOWS into a job stream on a different workstation
#   - event-driven trigger (EDWA-style) reference
#   - jobs whose scripts invoke downstream tools (ksh -> spark-submit, ab initio)
#   - comments, blank lines, continuation, mixed case keywords
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------


#=============================================================================
# WORKSTATION DEFINITIONS
#=============================================================================
CPUNAME ETL_AGENT_01
  DESCRIPTION "Primary ETL fault-tolerant agent"
  OS UNIX
  NODE etl01.bank.internal TCPADDR 31111
  FOR MAESTRO
    TYPE FTA
    AUTOLINK ON
    BEHINDFIREWALL OFF
END

CPUNAME ETL_AGENT_02
  DESCRIPTION "Secondary ETL agent - Spark submit host"
  OS UNIX
  NODE etl02.bank.internal TCPADDR 31111
  FOR MAESTRO
    TYPE FTA
    AUTOLINK ON
END

CPUNAME DB_AGENT_01
  DESCRIPTION "Database / warehouse agent"
  OS UNIX
  NODE db01.bank.internal TCPADDR 31111
  FOR MAESTRO
    TYPE FTA
END

CPUNAME MASTER_DM
  DESCRIPTION "Master domain manager"
  OS UNIX
  NODE mdm.bank.internal TCPADDR 31111
  FOR MAESTRO
    TYPE MANAGER
END


#=============================================================================
# CALENDAR DEFINITIONS
#=============================================================================
CALENDAR BANK_WORKDAYS
  "Business days excluding bank holidays"
  01/02/2026 01/05/2026 01/06/2026 01/07/2026 01/08/2026
  01/09/2026 01/12/2026 01/13/2026 01/14/2026

CALENDAR MONTH_END
  "Month-end processing dates"
  01/31/2026 02/28/2026 03/31/2026 04/30/2026


#=============================================================================
# RESOURCE DEFINITIONS (semaphores)
#=============================================================================
RESOURCE ETL_AGENT_01#DB_CONN_POOL 10
  "Concurrent warehouse connections"

RESOURCE ETL_AGENT_02#SPARK_SLOTS 4
  "Available Spark executor slots"

RESOURCE DB_AGENT_01#REDSHIFT_LOAD_LOCK 1
  "Exclusive lock for Redshift bulk load"


#=============================================================================
# PROMPT DEFINITIONS (manual gates)
#=============================================================================
PROMPT RECON_SIGNOFF
  "Operations: confirm overnight recon balanced? (Y to release)"

PROMPT DR_FAILOVER_OK
  ":Proceed with DR-region failover load? Requires duty manager approval."


#=============================================================================
# JOB STREAM 1 : INGESTION  (runs on ETL_AGENT_01)
#   Contains the chained ingestion pipeline + a job named "VALIDATE"
#   NOTE: a different job ALSO named "VALIDATE" exists in stream RECONCILE.
#         The parser MUST keep them distinct by qualified name.
#=============================================================================
SCHEDULE ETL_AGENT_01#INGESTION
  DESCRIPTION "Nightly source ingestion pipeline"
  ON RUNCYCLE DAILY_RC VALIDFROM 01/01/2026 "FREQ=DAILY;INTERVAL=1"
  ON RUNCYCLE WORKDAY_RC CALENDAR BANK_WORKDAYS
  EXCEPT RUNCYCLE HOLIDAY_EXC "FREQ=YEARLY;BYMONTH=12;BYMONTHDAY=25"
  AT 0100
  UNTIL 0500 ONUNTIL CANC
  PRIORITY 50
  LIMIT 5
  CARRYFORWARD
  :
  #-- pull from source systems
  ETL_AGENT_01#EXTRACT_ORDERS
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/etl/bin/extract_orders.ksh"
    STREAMLOGON etluser
    DESCRIPTION "Extract orders from OLTP into landing"
    RECOVERY STOP
    OPENS ETL_AGENT_01#"/data/landing/orders_ready.flag"
    AT 0105
  ETL_AGENT_01#EXTRACT_CUSTOMERS
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/etl/bin/extract_customers.ksh"
    STREAMLOGON etluser
    DESCRIPTION "Extract customers from CRM"
    RECOVERY CONTINUE
  #-- transform: needs BOTH extracts (join dependency) + a resource
  ETL_AGENT_01#TRANSFORM_LANDING
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/etl/bin/transform.ksh"
    STREAMLOGON etluser
    DESCRIPTION "Normalize landing tables - invokes spark-submit"
    FOLLOWS EXTRACT_ORDERS IF SUCC
    FOLLOWS EXTRACT_CUSTOMERS IF SUCC
    NEEDS 1 ETL_AGENT_01#DB_CONN_POOL
    PRIORITY 60
    RECOVERY RERUN AFTER ETL_AGENT_01#CLEANUP_LANDING
  #-- conditional branch on a specific return code
  ETL_AGENT_01#QUALITY_GATE
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/etl/bin/dq_check.ksh"
    STREAMLOGON etluser
    DESCRIPTION "Data quality gate; RC 0=ok 4=warn 8=fail"
    FOLLOWS TRANSFORM_LANDING IF RC=0
  ETL_AGENT_01#QUALITY_QUARANTINE
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/etl/bin/quarantine.ksh"
    STREAMLOGON etluser
    DESCRIPTION "Quarantine bad records on DQ warn"
    FOLLOWS TRANSFORM_LANDING IF RC=4
  ETL_AGENT_01#CLEANUP_LANDING
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/etl/bin/cleanup.ksh"
    STREAMLOGON etluser
    DESCRIPTION "Recovery cleanup job (referenced by RECOVERY above)"
  #-- internal validate (collides by short name with RECONCILE.VALIDATE)
  ETL_AGENT_01#VALIDATE
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/etl/bin/validate_ingest.ksh"
    STREAMLOGON etluser
    DESCRIPTION "Validate ingestion row counts"
    FOLLOWS QUALITY_GATE IF SUCC
    EVERY 0030
END

#=============================================================================
# JOB STREAM 2 : TRANSFORM_SPARK  (runs on ETL_AGENT_02)
#   Cross-stream + cross-workstation FOLLOWS into INGESTION above.
#   Demonstrates qualified external dependency: workstation#stream.job
#=============================================================================
SCHEDULE ETL_AGENT_02#TRANSFORM_SPARK
  DESCRIPTION "Spark aggregation layer"
  ON RUNCYCLE DAILY_RC "FREQ=DAILY;INTERVAL=1"
  AT 0200
  DEADLINE 0600
  PRIORITY 55
  :
  ETL_AGENT_02#SPARK_AGGREGATE
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/spark/submit_aggregate.sh"
    STREAMLOGON sparkuser
    DESCRIPTION "spark-submit daily aggregation; writes analytics.daily_summary"
    #-- external dependency: must wait for INGESTION.VALIDATE on the OTHER agent
    FOLLOWS ETL_AGENT_01#INGESTION.VALIDATE IF SUCC
    NEEDS 2 ETL_AGENT_02#SPARK_SLOTS
    OPENS ETL_AGENT_01#"/data/landing/orders_ready.flag"
    RECOVERY CONTINUE
  ETL_AGENT_02#SPARK_ENRICH
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/spark/submit_enrich.sh"
    STREAMLOGON sparkuser
    DESCRIPTION "Enrichment join against reference data"
    FOLLOWS SPARK_AGGREGATE IF SUCC
    NEEDS 2 ETL_AGENT_02#SPARK_SLOTS
END

#=============================================================================
# JOB STREAM 3 : WAREHOUSE_LOAD  (runs on DB_AGENT_01)
#   Join dependency from a DIFFERENT stream + exclusive resource + prompt
#=============================================================================
SCHEDULE DB_AGENT_01#WAREHOUSE_LOAD
  DESCRIPTION "Load aggregates into Redshift/warehouse"
  ON RUNCYCLE DAILY_RC "FREQ=DAILY;INTERVAL=1"
  AT 0300
  PRIORITY 45
  :
  DB_AGENT_01#LOAD_DIM
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/dwh/load_dimensions.ksh"
    STREAMLOGON dwhuser
    DESCRIPTION "Load dimension tables first"
    FOLLOWS ETL_AGENT_02#TRANSFORM_SPARK.SPARK_ENRICH IF SUCC
    NEEDS 1 DB_AGENT_01#REDSHIFT_LOAD_LOCK
  DB_AGENT_01#LOAD_FACT
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/dwh/load_facts.ksh"
    STREAMLOGON dwhuser
    DESCRIPTION "Load fact tables after dims"
    FOLLOWS LOAD_DIM IF SUCC
    NEEDS 1 DB_AGENT_01#REDSHIFT_LOAD_LOCK
    PROMPT RECON_SIGNOFF
    RECOVERY STOP AFTER DB_AGENT_01#LOAD_ROLLBACK
  DB_AGENT_01#LOAD_ROLLBACK
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/dwh/rollback_load.ksh"
    STREAMLOGON dwhuser
    DESCRIPTION "Rollback recovery job"
  DB_AGENT_01#REFRESH_VIEWS
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/dwh/refresh_matviews.ksh"
    STREAMLOGON dwhuser
    DESCRIPTION "Refresh materialized views; tolerate dim OR fact path"
    FOLLOWS LOAD_FACT IF SUCC
    FOLLOWS LOAD_DIM IF ABEND
END

#=============================================================================
# JOB STREAM 4 : RECONCILE  (runs on DB_AGENT_01, month-end only)
#   Contains a SECOND job named VALIDATE (collision test).
#   Manual prompt gate + month-end run cycle + event trigger reference.
#=============================================================================
SCHEDULE DB_AGENT_01#RECONCILE
  DESCRIPTION "Month-end reconciliation"
  ON RUNCYCLE MONTHEND_RC CALENDAR MONTH_END
  AT 0400
  UNTIL 0800
  PRIORITY 70
  :
  DB_AGENT_01#RECON_PREP
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/recon/prep.ksh"
    STREAMLOGON reconuser
    DESCRIPTION "Stage reconciliation inputs"
    FOLLOWS DB_AGENT_01#WAREHOUSE_LOAD.REFRESH_VIEWS IF SUCC
  #-- SECOND job named VALIDATE: must stay distinct from INGESTION.VALIDATE
  DB_AGENT_01#VALIDATE
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/recon/validate_balances.ksh"
    STREAMLOGON reconuser
    DESCRIPTION "Validate GL balances reconcile to source"
    FOLLOWS RECON_PREP IF SUCC
    PROMPT RECON_SIGNOFF
  DB_AGENT_01#RECON_REPORT
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/recon/report.ksh"
    STREAMLOGON reconuser
    DESCRIPTION "Emit recon report; gated on manual signoff"
    FOLLOWS VALIDATE IF SUCC
    PROMPT DR_FAILOVER_OK
END

#=============================================================================
# JOB STREAM 5 : DR_FAILOVER  (event-driven, no run cycle)
#   Triggered by an event rule rather than a calendar. Cross-everything deps.
#=============================================================================
SCHEDULE MASTER_DM#DR_FAILOVER
  DESCRIPTION "Disaster-recovery region load, event triggered"
  PRIORITY 90
  :
  MASTER_DM#DR_REPLICATE
    SCRIPTNAME "/opt/dr/replicate.ksh"
    STREAMLOGON druser
    DESCRIPTION "Replicate latest warehouse snapshot to DR region"
    FOLLOWS DB_AGENT_01#WAREHOUSE_LOAD.REFRESH_VIEWS IF SUCC
    PROMPT DR_FAILOVER_OK
    RECOVERY RERUN
END

#=============================================================================
# EVENT RULE (EDWA-style) : triggers DR_FAILOVER on a file arrival
#=============================================================================
EVENTRULE DR_TRIGGER_RULE
  DESCRIPTION "Launch DR failover when trigger file lands"
  IS ACTIVE
  EVENTRULETYPE filter
  EVENT FileCreated
    NODE mdm.bank.internal
    FILENAME "/data/dr/trigger_failover.flag"
  ACTION SBS
    JOBSTREAM MASTER_DM#DR_FAILOVER
END
